title: helictotrichon adsurgens subsp. ausserdorferi
intro: Helictotrichon adsurgens subsp. ausserdorferi is a subspecies of the grass-like plant Helictotrichon adsurgens, belonging to the family Poaceae. It is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that aid in wound healing and reducing swelling. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health concerns. In herbal preparations, Helictotrichon adsurgens subsp. ausserdorferi is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, highlighting its potential as a natural remedy for various ailments.
